reviews.comment:
Las instalaciones son de 10. La atención mala. Como si fuera por obligación. Da para parar por los chicos y los juegos nada mas

(Translated by Google)
The facilities are great. The service is terrible. It's like they're just doing it out of obligation. It's only worth stopping by for the kids and the games, nothing more.

reviews.comment:
Recientemente hice erróneamente, un comentario sobre la mala organización del ingreso de vehículos a la playa, no correspondía a esta estación de servicio, sino al ACA Luján. YPF Río Tala, es excelente, limpia organizada, con baños impecables y muy buena atención, y en la noche tienen seguridad brindado por policía adicional. Excelente opción para hacer un descanso en la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
I recently made a mistaken comment about the poor organization of vehicle access to the beach; it wasn't about this service station, but rather the ACA Luján. YPF Río Tala is excellent: clean, organized, with spotless restrooms and very good service, and at night they have additional police security. An excellent option for a rest stop on the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMHVuYzhRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
